---
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
    html_document:
        theme: spacelab
        toc: true
        number_sections: false
        toc_float: true
        code_download: true
toc_collapsed: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
params:
  pactName: "PACT-22-##"
  userName: "User Name"
  workDir: "/Volumes/CBioinformatics/jonathan/pact/consensus"
---

```{r, label='PACTNameInput', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Input Parameters
pactName <- params$pactName #<- "PACT-22-10"
userName <- params$userName#<- "Jonathan"
workDir  <- params$workDir# <- "/Volumes/CBioinformatics/jonathan/pact/consensus"

# To Knit RMD, copy to same directory ----------------
#"_MethylMatch.xlsx","-QC.tsv","-SampleSheet.csv", and all ".FACETS.cnv.plot.pdf" files

```

```{r, label='Input paths', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
outDir <- file.path(workDir, paste0(pactName,"_consensus"))
message("Now Knitting ", pactName, ".html")

philipsFtp <- "/Volumes/molecular/Molecular/Philips_SFTP" # Philips datadump path
methSheet <- paste0(pactName,"_MethylMatch.xlsx") # MethylMatch excel file in same directory
qcTsv <- paste0(pactName,"-QC.tsv") # tsv file that is from QC
#https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NYU-Molecular-Pathology/Methylation/main/
#PACT_scripts/PACT_desc.csv
descrip <- paste0(pactName,"_desc.csv") # your concensus file from github

pdfDir <- file.path(getwd(),"FACETpdfs") # input facet pdf directory
pngOutDir <- file.path(outDir,"cnvpng") # output copy of cnvPNG files
pngDir <- file.path(outDir,"methCNV") # output copy of methylation png files
methDir <- "/Volumes/molecular/Molecular/MethylationClassifier/CNV_PNG"
```

---
title: "Consensus `r pactName`"
author: "`r userName`"
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
<style>
.main-container {margin: 0;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;padding:0;align-items: start;
  display: inline-block;
  justify-content: left;
}
div.main-container {
  margin: 0;
  padding:0;
  align-items: left;
  display: inline-block;
  justify-content: left;
  }
.tocify{
  width:"110px";
  margin: 0;
  padding:0;
  align-items: left;
  display: inline;
  justify-content: left;
  float:left;
  }
#TOC{width: "100px";}
#TOC{   
    margin: 0 !important;
    height: 100%;
    border: none;
    padding: 0;
    background-color: white;
    left: 0;
    border-right: 1px solid #e7e7e7
    display: inline;
    justify-content: left;
    float:left;
    background: white;
    z-index: 289;
    }
.tocify{
  background-color: white;
  border-radius: 0px;
  background: white;
  z-index: 289;
}

.list-group-item{
  background-color: white;
}
div.tocify {
    width: 110px;
    max-width: 200px;
    max-height: 100% !important;
  z-index: 289;
}
.toc-content {
    padding-left: 20px;
    padding-right: 20px;
    margin: 0px;
    text-align: left;
    display:block;
    width:1400px;
  z-index: 1;
  
}
.row {
    margin-left: 120px;
    margin-right: 0px;
    display: grid;
}

.datatables, .html-widget, .html-widget-static-bound{
  width:100%;
  float: left;
  display: inline-block;
  z-index: 1;
}

.dataTables_wrapper, .dataTables_filter {
    float: left;
    text-align:left;
    padding-left:0px;
}
</style>
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
# Librarian checks if package exists, if it cannot load, it tries to install package from CRAN, then BioConductor, & GitHub
if(!require("librarian")){install.packages("librarian", dependencies=T, verbose=T, Ncpus = 6, quiet=T)}
pkgs <- c(
  "animation","tidyverse","knitr","kableExtra","stringr","readr","ggplot2","data.table","plotly", "DT","pdftools", "htmltools", "forcats", "stringr", "dplyr", "purrr", "tidyr", "tibble", "stats", "graphics", "grDevices", "utils", "datasets","methods", "base","magrittr","crayon")
librarian::shelf(pkgs, ask=F)
animation::ani.options(autobrowse = FALSE); options(width=1400)
```

<span style="background-color:lightgreen;">PASS</span>  

```{r, label='Check Pathways', echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
critialMnts <- c("/Volumes/CBioinformatics/Methylation/", "/Volumes/molecular/MOLECULAR LAB ONLY")
# Checks if the drives are mounted
checkMounts <- function(critialMnts){
    failMount <- lapply(critialMnts, function(driveMount){
      ifelse(!dir.exists(driveMount),return(T),return(F))}
      )
    if(any(failMount==T)){
        toFix <- paste(critialMnts[which(failMount==T)])
        cat("PATH does not exist, ensure drive is mounted:", toFix, sep="\n")
        message(paste("\nTry executing:\nsystem('diskutil mountdisk",toFix,"')"))
        stopifnot(!any(failMount==T))
        }else{message("All network Drive paths are accessible")}
}

checkMounts(critialMnts)
# Changes the working directory and creates output directory
if(!dir.exists(outDir)){dir.create(outDir)}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = outDir)
sysCmd <- paste("cd", outDir)
system(sysCmd)
setwd(outDir)
message("Working directory changed to:\n",outDir)
```

```{r, label='Check Data Files', echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
samsheet <- list.files(pattern = "-SampleSheet.csv", all.files = T)[1]

stopifnot(file.exists(samsheet) & file.exists(methSheet) & file.exists(qcTsv))

if(!file.exists(descrip)){
  warning(paste("Description file missing:", descrip, 
                "\nFile must be in same directory as Rmd:", getwd()))
}
stopifnot(file.exists(descrip) & dir.exists(philipsFtp))
methData <- as.data.frame(readxl::read_excel(methSheet))
methData <- methData[methData$report_complete=="YES",]
samList <- read.csv(samsheet,skip=19)[, c("Test_Number","Specimen_ID","Tumor_Content")] 
samples <- unique(samList$Test_Number)
samples <- samples[samples!=0 & !is.na(samples)]
qcData <- read.delim(file=qcTsv)
row.names(qcData) <- qcData$Row
snvDt <- read.csv(descrip)

message("methSams listed below:\n"); print(methData$record_id)
message("Your samples:\n"); print(samples)
message("Number of sample rows:\n"); print(c(1:length(samples)))
message("qcData:\n"); print(qcData[,2:4])
message("Your description file heading:\n"); print(head(snvDt))
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
# Init Step to make sure that the dependencies are loaded
htmltools::tagList(DT::datatable(cars, options=list(pageLength = 100, width="100%")))
htmltools::tagList(plotly::ggplotly(ggplot2::ggplot()))
```

```{r, label='Data Table Output', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library("kableExtra")
# Default header text for QC tab for sample
qcHeader <- c("Sample", "Mapped Reads QC", "Deduplicated Reads QC", "Targets with <50 Coverage",
              "Avg and Median Coverage", "Overlapped HOMO SNP")
# Options for Data.Table parameters
dtOpts <- list(scrollX = T, scrollY=T, info = F, autoWidth = T, pageLength = 100, rownames=T, lengthChange = T, searchable = T)

makePdfTab <- function(pdfFi){
  pdfFi <- file.path(outDir,"cnvpng",paste0(pdfFi,".png"))
    cat("Note: CNV Amplifications are listed first,", 
        "followed by ALL Philips CNV abberations in table below\n\n")
    cat(paste0("![CNV Plot](", pdfFi, "){width=100%}"))
    cat("\n\n")
}

makeRdTab <- function(rdNumb, sam) {
  cnvFi <- file.path(".",basename(pngDir), 
                     paste0(rdNumb, "_cnv.png"))
  #cnvFi <- file.path(pngDir, paste0(rdNumb, "_cnv.png"))
  altTxt <- paste("![Methylation",rdNumb,sam,"CNV Plot](")
  cat(paste0(altTxt,cnvFi,"){width=120%}"))
  cat("\n\n")
}

makeSpecimenTab <- function(objDat){
  newTa <- knitr::kable(objDat, row.names=F, "html")
  newTa <- kableExtra::kable_styling(newTa, bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), 
                                     full_width = T, position="left") 
  newTa <- kableExtra::column_spec(newTa, 1:5, width = "2cm")
  print(newTa)
  cat("\n\n")
}

makeQCTab <- function(objDat){
  colnames(objDat) <- qcHeader
      newTa <- knitr::kable(objDat, row.names=F, "html")
      newTa <- kableExtra::kable_styling(newTa, bootstrap_options = c("striped","condensed"),
                                         full_width = F, position="left")
      newTa <- kableExtra::column_spec(newTa, 1:5, width = "4cm")
      print(newTa)
      cat("\n\n")
}

makeDefaultDt <- function(objDat){
  message("Note: INDEL/Frameshift calls have tumor freq >= 5%,",
          "normal freq <2%, and tumor read depth >50")
  dtTab <- htmltools::tagList(
    DT::datatable(objDat, rownames = F, options=dtOpts, height = "120%", width="100%"))
  print(dtTab)
  cat("\n\n")
}

# Prints out the table tab headings and tab information based on object parameters provided
makeDT <- function(tabNam, objDat, pdfFi=NULL, rdNumb=NULL, sam=NULL){
  cat(paste0("## **", tabNam,"** \n\n"))
  if(!is.null(pdfFi)){makePdfTab(pdfFi)}
  if(!is.null(rdNumb)){makeRdTab(rdNumb, sam)}
  if(stringr::str_detect(tabNam,"Specimen")==T){makeSpecimenTab(objDat)} else{
  if(!is.null(objDat)){
    if(tabNam=="QC"){makeQCTab(objDat)}else{makeDefaultDt(objDat)}
  }else{
    cat("\n\nNo additional data table for this sample tab\n\n")
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  }
}
```

```{r, label='Philips Data Parse', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Parses the philips CNV abberations export from Philips dump csv file
parsePhilipsCn <- function(cnvInfo, sam, cnvTab){
  cnvInfo$Test_Case <- sam
  cnvInfo$Variant <- "CNV"
  cnvInfo$Mutation.Type <- cnvInfo$AberrationType
  cnvInfo$Other <- cnvInfo$Chrom
  cnvInfo$Comments <- substr(cnvInfo$CopyNumber,1,3)
  cnvInfo$In.NYU <- cnvInfo$In.Philips <- NA
  cnvInfo$IGV <- "Copy Number"
  newTab <- cnvInfo[,names(cnvTab)]
  newTab <- rbind(cnvTab,newTab)
  cnvTab <- newTab
  dropMut <- cnvTab$Mutation.Type!="Hemizygous Loss"
  return(cnvTab[dropMut,])
}

parseCNV <- function(outPath, sam, cnvTab){
  cnvFi = file.path(outPath, sam, "aberration_cnv.csv")
    cnvInfo <- as.data.frame(
      readr::read_csv(cnvFi, col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()))
      )
    if (nrow(cnvInfo) > 0) {
      cnvTab <- parsePhilipsCn(cnvInfo, sam, cnvTab)
    }
    return(cnvTab)
}

getDumpFiles <- function(outPath, sam, cnvTab){
  samZip <- paste0(sam, ".zip")
  dumpDir <- file.path(philipsFtp, samZip)
  destDir <- file.path(outPath, paste0(basename(samZip)))
  if (file.exists(dumpDir)) {
    if (!file.exists(file.path(outDir, samZip))) {
      try(fs::file_copy(path = dumpDir, new_path = destDir), silent = T)
      unzip(zipfile = destDir, exdir = outPath)
    }
    cnvTab<-parseCNV(outPath, sam,cnvTab)
  }
}

# Appends any additional cnv abberations from data dump
checkDataDump <- function(sam, cnvTab) {
  outPath <- file.path(getwd(), "zipfiles")
  if (!dir.exists(outPath)) {dir.create(outPath)}
  cnvTab<-getDumpFiles(outPath, sam , cnvTab)
  drpCol <- which(stringr::str_detect(colnames(cnvTab), "In."))
  cnvTab <- cnvTab[,-drpCol]
  return(cnvTab)
}
```


```{r, label='PDF to PNG functions', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}

checkTumorPdf <- function(samList, pngOutDir){
  if(!dir.exists(pngOutDir)){dir.create(pngOutDir)}
  pdfList <- list.files(pattern = "*.pdf", recursive = T)
  toDrop <- samList$Tumor_Content != 0 & samList$Specimen_ID != "SC"
  tumors <- samList[toDrop, ] # drop controls/normals
  row.names(tumors)<- 1:nrow(tumors) # re-number rows
  if(length(pdfList)!=nrow(tumors)){
    warning("Number of sample rows ", nrow(tumors), 
            " does not equal length of pdf files: ",
            length(pdfList), "\nCheck if any are missing:\n")
    print(pdfList)
  }
  return(tumors)
}

# Converts FACETS PDF cnv facets to PNG format renamed as NGS name----------------------------------
convert.plots <- function(tumors, pdfList) {
  ngsOrder = which(sapply(tumors$Specimen_ID, grepl, pdfList), arr.ind = T)[, "row"] 
  invisible(lapply(X=1:length(ngsOrder), FUN=function(X){
    pngName <- paste0(tumors$Test_Number[X], ".png")
    pdfFile <- pdfList[ngsOrder[X]]
    
    tryCatch(
      expr = {suppressWarnings(
        pdftools::pdf_convert(
          pdfFile,
          filenames = file.path("cnvpng", pngName),
          dpi = 300
          ))},
      error = function(e) {
        message("There was an error:\n",e,"\nTry running:\nbrew install fontconfig --universal")}
      )
    }))
}

checkMethCnv <- function(methData){
  methSamples <- paste(methData$record_id,"cnv.png",sep = "_")
  methSamples <- methSamples[methData$report_complete=="YES"]
  if(!dir.exists(pngDir)){dir.create(pngDir)}
  for(mSam in methSamples){
    methPath <- file.path(methDir,mSam)
    methOut <-file.path(pngDir,mSam)
    if(!file.exists(methOut)){
    if(file.exists(methPath)){
      fs::file_copy(path=methPath, new_path = file.path(pngDir,mSam))
    }else{
      warning("Sample failed to copy:\n", methPath)
    }
      }
    
  }
}
```

```{r, label='PNG Output', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Checks if the facets pdfs have been converted to png
message("Checking if cnvpng folder exists...")
tumors <- checkTumorPdf(samList, pngOutDir)
pdfList <- list.files(pattern = "*.pdf", recursive = T)
if(!dir.exists(pngOutDir)){convert.plots(tumors,pdfList)}
if(!dir.exists(pdfDir)){
  dir.create(pdfDir)
  try(fs::file_move(pdfList, pdfDir), silent = T)
}
message("Checking if methcnv files copied locally...")
checkMethCnv(methData)
```


```{r, label='New Tabs Maker', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Generates a new Sample Tabbed row in html ------------------------------------
makeNewTab <- function(sam){
  #message("Now creating ", sam, " tab")
  cat(paste("\n\n#", sam, "{.tabset}","\n\n"))
  currSam <- samList[samList$Test_Number==sam,"Specimen_ID"]
  currQC <- grepl(paste(currSam, collapse="|"), qcData$Sample)
  qcTab <- qcData[currQC,2:ncol(qcData)]
  return(qcTab)
}

# Generates a new Sample Tabbed row in html  -------------------------------
makeMethTab <- function(sam, methCn){
  if (any(sam %in% methData$Test_Number) == TRUE) {
    currRD <- methData$record_id[methData$Test_Number == sam]
    if (length(currRD) > 1) {
      message(sam, " has more than one methylation RD-number: ", currRD)
      message("Will create tab for each RD png file")
      for (rd in 1:length(currRD)) {
        rdTab <- paste0("Methylation", rd)
        makeDT(rdTab, methCn, pdfFi=NULL, currRD[rd], sam)
        }
    } else{
      makeDT("Methylation",methCn,NULL,currRD,sam)
      }
  } else{
    cat("## **No Methylation** \n\n")
    cat("\n\nNo additional data table for this sample tab\n\n")
    }
}
```

```{r, label='Abberations Output', echo=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE}

# Filters out Philips Abberations Tab ------------------------------------------------------------------------
filterAbberations <- function(snvOut){
  snvOut$tumor_freq <- readr::parse_number(snvOut$tumor_freq)
    snvOut <- snvOut[!is.na(snvOut$tumor_freq),]
    snvOut <- snvOut[snvOut$tumor_freq>=5,]
    fltrStr <- stringr::str_detect(snvOut$AberrationType, pattern="frame|delet|insert|indel")
    snvOut <- snvOut[fltrStr,]
    drpFlt <- as.numeric(sub("%","",snvOut$normal_freq)) < 2.0
    snvOut <- snvOut[drpFlt,]
    drpFlt <- as.numeric(sub("%","",snvOut$tumor_freq)) >= 5.0
    snvOut <- snvOut[drpFlt,]
    drpFlt <- snvOut$tumor_dp >= 50
    snvOut <- snvOut[drpFlt,]
    return(snvOut)
}

colOrder <- c("HGNC_gene", "AberrationType", "Coordinate", "tumor_freq", "normal_freq", "tumor_dp", "normal_dp", "THERAPY_AVAILABILITY", "HGVSp_Short", "SomaticStatus")

printSnvs <- function(snvCsv){
  snvOut <- as.data.frame(read.delim(snvCsv,sep = ","))
    snvOut <- snvOut[,colOrder]
    snvOut <- filterAbberations(snvOut)
    makeDT("Philips SNV All", snvOut)
    cat("\n\n")
}

printSpecInfo <- function(samCsv){
  samOut <- as.data.frame(read.delim(samCsv, sep = ","))
  samOut <- samOut[, c(1, 3:13)]
  makeDT("Philips Specimen Info", samOut)
  cat("\n\n")
}

# Makes Abberations Tab ------------------------------------------------------------------------
makeAbTab <- function(sam){
  dumpDir <- file.path(getwd(), "zipfiles", sam)
  snvCsv <- file.path(dumpDir, "aberration_snv.csv")
  samCsv <- file.path(dumpDir, "specimen.csv")
  if(file.exists(snvCsv)){printSnvs(snvCsv)} else{
      message("Data dump directory not found:\n", dumpDir)}
  if(file.exists(samCsv)){printSpecInfo(samCsv)}else{
    message("Data dump directory not found:\n", dumpDir)}
}

```
  
```{r, label='Table Output', echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, fig.keep='all', include=TRUE, fig.align="left", fig.show="asis", out.width = '100%', results='asis'}
makeBlankRow <- function(sam) {
  nonMutant <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(snvDt), nrow = 1))
  colnames(nonMutant) <- colnames(snvDt)
  nonMutant[1, ] <- "None"
  nonMutant$Test_Case <- sam
  makeDT("In-House SNV/INDEL", objDat = nonMutant)
}

# Iterates for each NGS sample
for (sam in samples) {
  qcTab <- makeNewTab(sam)
  if(nrow(qcTab)==0){message(sam, " is missing from ", qcTsv)}else{makeDT("QC",qcTab)}
  if(sam %in% snvDt$Test_Case){
    samRows <- snvDt$Test_Case==sam
    snvTab <- snvDt[samRows & snvDt$Variant=="SNV",]
    makeDT("In-House SNV/INDEL", objDat=snvTab)
  }else{makeBlankRow(sam)}
  cnvTab <- checkDataDump(sam,cnvTab=snvDt[samRows & snvDt$Variant=="CNV",])
  makeDT("CNV",cnvTab, pdfFi=sam)
  methCn <- snvDt[samRows & snvDt$Variant=="Methylation",]
  if(nrow(methCn)==0) {methCn = NULL}
  makeMethTab(sam, methCn)
  makeAbTab(sam)
  }
```
